title: Implementing a custom storage backend
text: Two kinds object flow rack layer. backend store – board, database handle client object. dispatch target generics operate store whole: as_rack_id(), rack_capabilities(), rack_list(), rack_upload() rack_find_users(). rack_id handle one stored record. dispatch target generics read mutate single record: rack_download(), rack_exists(), rack_info(), rack_name(), rack_delete() rest. Application code never calls generics directly. uses high-level entry points – rack_create() insert new record, rack_append() add version existing one, rack_load() read one back – built generics. instance, rack_create() coerces board id rack_id as_rack_id(), checks rack_exists(), stores payload rack_upload(). Implement generics whole high-level API comes along free. two objects minted exported constructors, new_rack_id() new_rack_record(), taking class argument backend carries subclass. subclass per-record generics dispatch . See ?"rack-backend" full generic--generic reference; sections worked path .

title: Implementing a custom storage backend
text: every store supports every feature. rack_capabilities() generic switch: returns named list logical flags, management UI reads decide optional features offer. Return FALSE flag can leave generics behind unimplemented – UI surface feature. backend returns FALSE sharing, visibility user_discovery – – needs none sharing, ACL user-lookup methods, navbar simply omits Sharing tab.

title: Implementing a custom storage backend
text: store keeps one directory per record root. record directory holds version payloads (1.json, 2.json, …) plus meta.json sidecar carrying display name , per version, timestamp content hash. rack_backend class second position matters: ticket past session_mgmt_backend option’s validation, accepts pins board anything inheriting rack_backend. first class, demo_store, backend generics dispatch . storage helpers keep methods short. plain file /O – part real backend swaps SQL HTTP. as_rack_id() generic coerces raw identifier backend’s rack_id subclass. raw identifier either component list (id, optionally version user, carried session URL) rack_record listing row; expose fields $, one line covers . dispatches backend, x. rack_upload() generic writes local file new version. rack_create() rack_append() funnel , handing serialized payload temp file plus record’s id, content_hash, – create – display name. assign next integer version, copy payload , record version sidecar. return value rack_id pinned version just written. rack_list() generic returns listing rows workflow menu renders, one rack_record() per record. saved field feeds “saved N minutes ago” label; tags argument (unused ) filter listing. dispatch rack_id_demo subclass: rack_exists() decides insert versus append; rack_download() returns local path payload, resolving latest version rack_id pins none; rack_info() lists versions newest-first data frame version, created ref columns. display name lives sidecar, rack_name() reads rack_rename() rewrites . rack_content_hash() generic returns stored hash latest version; app compares current board skip save change nothing. Deletion comes two grains: rack_delete() drops single version (whole record last version goes), rack_purge() removes record outright – grain workflow menu’s delete uses. store keeps versions name--hash sidecar, advertises versioning metadata. notion users, sharing access control, flags FALSE – none rack_share(), rack_acl() rack_find_users() appears .
code: demo_store <- function(dir = tempfile("demo_store")) {    dir.create(dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)    structure(list(dir = dir), class = c("demo_store", "rack_backend")) } record_dir <- function(backend, id) {   file.path(backend$dir, id) }  read_meta <- function(backend, id) {    path <- file.path(record_dir(backend, id), "meta.json")    if (!file.exists(path)) {     return(list(name = id, versions = list()))   }    jsonlite::read_json(path) }  write_meta <- function(backend, id, meta) {   jsonlite::write_json(     meta,     file.path(record_dir(backend, id), "meta.json"),     auto_unbox = TRUE,     null = "null"   ) } as_rack_id.demo_store <- function(x, backend, ...) {   new_rack_id(x$id, version = x$version, class = "rack_id_demo") } rack_upload.demo_store <- function(backend, path, id, name = NULL,                                    content_hash = NULL, ...) {    dir <- record_dir(backend, id$id)   dir.create(dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)    meta <- read_meta(backend, id$id)   version <- as.character(length(meta$versions) + 1L)    file.copy(path, file.path(dir, paste0(version, ".json")), overwrite = TRUE)    if (!is.null(name)) {     meta$name <- name   }    meta$versions <- c(     meta$versions,     list(       list(version = version, created = format(Sys.time()), hash = content_hash)     )   )    write_meta(backend, id$id, meta)    new_rack_id(id$id, version = version, class = "rack_id_demo") } rack_list.demo_store <- function(backend, tags = NULL, ...) {    ids <- list.dirs(backend$dir, full.names = FALSE, recursive = FALSE)    lapply(     ids,     function(rid) {       meta <- read_meta(backend, rid)       latest <- meta$versions[[length(meta$versions)]]       new_rack_record(id = rid, name = meta$name, saved = latest$created)     }   ) } rack_exists.rack_id_demo <- function(id, backend, ...) {   file.exists(file.path(record_dir(backend, id$id), "meta.json")) }  rack_download.rack_id_demo <- function(id, backend, ...) {    info <- rack_info(id, backend)    if (nrow(info) == 0L) {     stop("No versions stored for record ", id$id)   }    version <- if (is.null(id$version)) info$version[1L] else id$version    file.path(record_dir(backend, id$id), paste0(version, ".json")) }  rack_info.rack_id_demo <- function(id, backend, ...) {    versions <- read_meta(backend, id$id)$versions    if (length(versions) == 0L) {     return(       data.frame(         version = character(),         created = as.POSIXct(character()),         ref = character(),         stringsAsFactors = FALSE       )     )   }    version <- vapply(versions, `[[`, character(1L), "version")   created <- vapply(versions, `[[`, character(1L), "created")   newest_first <- rev(seq_along(version))    data.frame(     version = version[newest_first],     created = as.POSIXct(created[newest_first]),     ref = version[newest_first],     stringsAsFactors = FALSE   ) } rack_name.rack_id_demo <- function(id, backend, ...) {   read_meta(backend, id$id)$name }  rack_rename.rack_id_demo <- function(id, backend, name, ...) {    meta <- read_meta(backend, id$id)   meta$name <- name   write_meta(backend, id$id, meta)    new_rack_id(id$id, version = id$version, class = "rack_id_demo") }  rack_content_hash.rack_id_demo <- function(id, backend, ...) {    versions <- read_meta(backend, id$id)$versions    if (length(versions) == 0L) {     return(NULL)   }    versions[[length(versions)]]$hash } rack_delete.rack_id_demo <- function(id, backend, ...) {    meta <- read_meta(backend, id$id)    version <- if (is.null(id$version)) {     meta$versions[[length(meta$versions)]]$version   } else {     id$version   }    unlink(file.path(record_dir(backend, id$id), paste0(version, ".json")))    meta$versions <- Filter(     function(v) !identical(v$version, version),     meta$versions   )    if (length(meta$versions) == 0L) {     unlink(record_dir(backend, id$id), recursive = TRUE)   } else {     write_meta(backend, id$id, meta)   }    invisible(TRUE) }  rack_purge.rack_id_demo <- function(id, backend, ...) {   unlink(record_dir(backend, id$id), recursive = TRUE)   invisible(TRUE) } rack_capabilities.demo_store <- function(backend, ...) {   list(     versioning = TRUE,     metadata = TRUE,     tags = FALSE,     sharing = FALSE,     visibility = FALSE,     user_discovery = FALSE   ) }

code: as_rack_id.demo_store <- function(x, backend, ...) {   new_rack_id(x$id, version = x$version, class = "rack_id_demo") } rack_upload.demo_store <- function(backend, path, id, name = NULL,                                    content_hash = NULL, ...) {    dir <- record_dir(backend, id$id)   dir.create(dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)    meta <- read_meta(backend, id$id)   version <- as.character(length(meta$versions) + 1L)    file.copy(path, file.path(dir, paste0(version, ".json")), overwrite = TRUE)    if (!is.null(name)) {     meta$name <- name   }    meta$versions <- c(     meta$versions,     list(       list(version = version, created = format(Sys.time()), hash = content_hash)     )   )    write_meta(backend, id$id, meta)    new_rack_id(id$id, version = version, class = "rack_id_demo") } rack_list.demo_store <- function(backend, tags = NULL, ...) {    ids <- list.dirs(backend$dir, full.names = FALSE, recursive = FALSE)    lapply(     ids,     function(rid) {       meta <- read_meta(backend, rid)       latest <- meta$versions[[length(meta$versions)]]       new_rack_record(id = rid, name = meta$name, saved = latest$created)     }   ) }

file.path(record_dir(backend, id$id), paste0(version, ".json")) }  rack_info.rack_id_demo <- function(id, backend, ...) {    versions <- read_meta(backend, id$id)$versions    if (length(versions) == 0L) {     return(       data.frame(         version = character(),         created = as.POSIXct(character()),         ref = character(),         stringsAsFactors = FALSE       )     )   }    version <- vapply(versions, `[[`, character(1L), "version")   created <- vapply(versions, `[[`, character(1L), "created")   newest_first <- rev(seq_along(version))    data.frame(     version = version[newest_first],     created = as.POSIXct(created[newest_first]),     ref = version[newest_first],     stringsAsFactors = FALSE   ) } rack_name.rack_id_demo <- function(id, backend, ...) {   read_meta(backend, id$id)$name }  rack_rename.rack_id_demo <- function(id, backend, name, ...) {    meta <- read_meta(backend, id$id)   meta$name <- name   write_meta(backend, id$id, meta)    new_rack_id(id$id, version = id$version, class = "rack_id_demo") }  rack_content_hash.rack_id_demo <- function(id, backend, ...) {    versions <- read_meta(backend, id$id)$versions    if (length(versions) == 0L) {     return(NULL)   }    versions[[length(versions)]]$hash } rack_delete.rack_id_demo <- function(id, backend, ...) {    meta <- read_meta(backend, id$id)    version <- if (is.null(id$version)) {     meta$versions[[length(meta$versions)]]$version   } else {     id$version   }    unlink(file.path(record_dir(backend, id$id), paste0(version, ".json")))    meta$versions <- Filter(     function(v) !identical(v$version, version),     meta$versions   )    if (length(meta$versions) == 0L) {     unlink(record_dir(backend, id$id), recursive = TRUE)   } else {     write_meta(backend, id$id, meta)   }    invisible(TRUE) }  rack_purge.rack_id_demo <- function(id, backend, ...) {   unlink(record_dir(backend, id$id), recursive = TRUE)   invisible(TRUE) }

title: Implementing a custom storage backend

title: Implementing a custom storage backend
text: whole backend. storage layer needs Shiny, can exercise directly – create, list, load, append, inspect, rename, delete. record saved, rack_list() reports one entry rack_load() reads back exactly stored. Saving appends version rather replacing record, rack_info() shows , newest first. name stored independently payload, rename sticks across reload, content hash lets app tell unchanged board modified one. Deleting record leaves store empty.
code: store <- demo_store()  board <- list(   blocks = list(list(id = "a", type = "dataset")),   links = list() )  id <- rack_create(store, board, id = "sales-report", name = "Sales report") id #> <rack_id: sales-report> rack_list(store) #> [[1]] #> <rack_record: sales-report (Sales report)>  identical(rack_load(id, store), board) #> [1] TRUE board$blocks <- c(board$blocks, list(list(id = "b", type = "filter")))  rack_append(id, store, board) #> <rack_id: sales-report>  rack_info(id, store) #>   version             created ref #> 1       2 2026-07-24 17:06:59   2 #> 2       1 2026-07-24 17:06:59   1 rack_rename(id, store, "Quarterly sales") #> <rack_id: sales-report> rack_name(as_rack_id(list(id = "sales-report"), store), store) #> [1] "Quarterly sales"  rack_content_hash(id, store) #> [1] "53abb582de74d031ce033ff3ee295976" rack_purge(id, store) rack_list(store) #> list()

title: Implementing a custom storage backend
text: capability switch decides much must implement. store turns versioning metadata; backend neither – say key-value store keeps latest state – returns FALSE every optional flag drops matching methods, leaving just create / load / list core: as_rack_id(), rack_upload(), rack_download(), rack_exists(), rack_list() rack_name(). Even rack_content_hash() worth keeping, since app calls skip -op saves. Add capabilities back one time store grows: flip versioning implement rack_info(); flip sharing visibility implement rack_share() / rack_acl() family. flag independent, backend can support exactly features store can back.

title: Implementing a custom storage backend
text: session_mgmt_backend option selects backend. accepts backend object zero-argument function returning one; function form resolved per session, credentials paths picked runtime rather app defined. manage_project() plugin renders navbar’s save controls workflow menu; rack_loader() board loader restores record named request URL backend. option set demo_store, saves loads now flow file store instead pins. ```
code: options(   blockr.session_mgmt_backend = function() demo_store("~/blockr-workflows") )  library(blockr.core) library(blockr.dock)  serve(   new_dock_board(),   plugins = custom_plugins(manage_project()),   loader = rack_loader() )

title: Session management for blockr
text: Project (.e. board) management provided blockr.core via preserve_board plugin simple file upload/download-based mechanism. user-friendly alternatives using pins package available manage_project plugin.

title: Session management for blockr
text: can install development version blockr.session GitHub :

title: Session management for blockr
text: can start app uses manage_project() plugin swapping default preserve_board() plugin. default storage backend [user_pins_board()]: Posit Connect resolves per-visitor pin storage visitor’s session token (falling back application’s Connect credentials), Connect falls back [pins::board_local()]. Override setting session_mgmt_backend [blockr_option()].
code: library(blockr.core) library(blockr.dock) library(blockr.session)  serve(   new_dock_board(),   plugins = custom_plugins(manage_project()) )

title: Session management for blockr
text: Posit Connect Connect API Integration enabled, user reads writes pins account box, backend option set. navbar dropdown gains Sharing tab (next Workflows History) lets set visibility share Connect users. override default, set option pins board function returning one, get_session_backend() calls per session credentials picked runtime. example, use single shared namespace publisher’s account instead per-visitor storage:

title: Session management for blockr
text: deploying Connect backend option needed: default [user_pins_board()] picks Connect credentials environment automatically.

what: Per-user pins with the Connect API Integration
title: Session management for blockr
text: Without integration, every viewer’s pins stored application’s Connect account, single shared namespace. viewer’s pins saved account instead, enable Connect API Integration content: Connect, open content’s Settings → Access tab. API Integrations, enable Posit Connect integration. Set maximum role Viewer (sufficient reading writing pins). integration enabled, Connect attaches per-visitor session token request, [user_pins_board()] exchanges (via connectapi::connect()) viewer-scoped API key, connectapi package required path.

title: Project management — manage_project
text: Enhanced session management navbar-compatible UI. Provides blockr.core::preserve_board() plugin full navbar layout including workflows, version history, editable title.

text: See blockr.core::preserve_board().

title: Rack storage backend contract — rack-backend
text: rack layer storage abstraction behind blockr session persistence: turns save stored, versioned record load back board state. shipped backend dispatches pins boards (see user_pins_board()), contract storage-agnostic – database document store supported implementing generics documented carrying rack_backend class, wiring non-pins backend session_mgmt_backend blockr.core::blockr_option() requires. high-level rack_create(), rack_append() rack_load() entry points application code calls built generics.

title: Rack storage backend contract — rack-backend
code: new_rack_id(id, version = NULL, user = NULL, ..., class = character())  new_rack_record(id, name, ..., class = character())  rack_content_hash(id, backend, ...)  rack_name(id, backend, ...)  rack_rename(id, backend, name, ...)  rack_exists(id, backend, ...)  rack_list(backend, tags = NULL, ...)  as_rack_id(x, backend, ...)  rack_info(id, backend, ...)  rack_download(id, backend, ...)  rack_upload(backend, path, ...)  rack_delete(id, backend, ...)  rack_purge(id, backend, ...)  rack_capabilities(backend, ...)  rack_tags(id, backend, ...)  rack_set_tags(id, backend, tags, ...)  rack_acl(id, backend, ...)  rack_set_acl(id, backend, acl_type, ...)  rack_share(id, backend, with_sub, ...)  rack_unshare(id, backend, with_sub, ...)  rack_shares(id, backend, ...)  rack_find_users(backend, query, ...)

title: Rack storage backend contract — rack-backend
text: id rack_id identifying stored record, accessor mutator generics. new_rack_id() new_rack_record(), record's storage id: non-empty string, stable independent display name. version new_rack_id(), optional version string pinning rack_id one stored version; NULL tracks latest. user new_rack_id(), owning account, used reach records stored another user's namespace. ... Passed methods; constructors, extra named fields stored object. class Character vector prepended object's class, backend carries rack_id / rack_record subclass. name Display name record, written backend's native name field never used storage key; NULL keeps current name. backend rack backend: storage object dispatched . pins board recognized directly; backend carries rack_backend class session_mgmt_backend option accepts . tags Character vector tags: filter applied rack_list() (NULL none), tag set written rack_set_tags(). x object coerce as_rack_id(): existing rack_id (returned unchanged), component bag – list identifier fields (id, optionally version user) rack_record – turned backend's rack_id subclass. path Path local file upload new version. acl_type Access-control level set, backend-defined (e.g. "private", "acl", ""). with_sub Backend identifier principal share record revoke. query Search prefix rack_find_users().

title: Rack storage backend contract — rack-backend
text: new_rack_id() new_rack_record() return rack_id rack_record respectively. rack_capabilities() returns named list flags . rack_list() returns list rack_records rack_info() data frame versions (columns version, created, ref, newest first). as_rack_id(), rack_upload() rack_rename() return rack_id; rack_download() local file path; rack_name() string; rack_exists() scalar logical; rack_content_hash() stored payload hash; rack_tags(), rack_acl() rack_shares() stored tags, access level shares. mutators (rack_set_tags(), rack_set_acl(), rack_share(), rack_unshare(), rack_delete(), rack_purge()) return invisibly.

title: Rack storage backend contract — rack-backend
text: Two kinds object flow contract. backend board store , dispatch target as_rack_id(), rack_capabilities(), rack_list(), rack_upload() rack_find_users(). rack_id handle one stored record, dispatch target remaining generics. as_rack_id() coerces raw identifier – component list rack_record listing row – backend's rack_id subclass (via new_rack_id(..., class = )) components (id, version, user) carried session URL, returns existing rack_id unchanged. rack_list() returns new_rack_record() summaries, listing rows workflow menu renders.

title: Rack storage backend contract — rack-backend
text: rack_capabilities() feature switch: returns named list logical flags declaring optional features backend supports, management UI gates matching generics . versioning: version history kept per record: rack_info() lists rack_download() / rack_delete() accept version. tags: rack_tags() rack_set_tags() implemented. metadata: display name (rack_name(), rack_rename()) content hash (rack_content_hash()) stored alongside payload. sharing: rack_share(), rack_unshare() rack_shares() implemented. visibility: rack_acl() rack_set_acl() implemented. user_discovery: rack_find_users() implemented. minimal backend implements core create / load / list set – as_rack_id(), rack_upload(), rack_download(), rack_exists(), rack_list(), rack_info() rack_name() – returns FALSE every optional capability; generics behind FALSE flag never reached need method.

what: Create or append to a session record on a rack backend — rack_create
title: Create or append to a session record on a rack backend — rack_create
text: rack_create() serialises data JSON stores new record keyed id – board's stable id, record id board id match. strict insert: errors (class rack_create_exists) id already names record rather appending version. name written backend's native display field. rack_append() adds new version existing record identified id, erroring (class rack_append_missing) none, never touches name. Together replace former rack_save(), separating insert append. change record's name, use rack_rename().

title: Create or append to a session record on a rack backend — rack_create

Additional arguments forwarded rack_upload().

title: Rack-backed board loader — rack_loader
text: blockr.core::board_loader() blockr.core::serve() picks board build request URL. board named URL handle (board_name / user / version) loads session_mgmt_backend backend; new handle (minted user hits New) yields empty board fresh id, saving forks distinct record rather overwriting served board; request without handle (cold load) gets cleared copy served board. backend resolved loader's request (GET, session) session (WS connect), user-scoped backend user_pins_board() resolves visitor's Posit Connect credentials phases; board visitor may read resolve, whatever user / board_name URL. Pair manage_project() calling blockr.core::serve(): serve(board, plugins = c(.., manage_project()), loader = rack_loader()).

title: Rack-backed board loader — rack_loader
text: blockr.core::board_loader() object.

what: Posit Connect storage backend with graceful fallback — user_pins_board
title: Posit Connect storage backend with graceful fallback — user_pins_board
text: Resolves storage backend session_mgmt_backend blockr.core::blockr_option() – default – three tiers, degrading instead erroring missing credential:

title: Posit Connect storage backend with graceful fallback — user_pins_board
Posit Connect storage backend with graceful fallback — user_pins_board
text: session Shiny session whose request carries Connect user session token; defaults current reactive domain.

title: Posit Connect storage backend with graceful fallback — user_pins_board
text: pins_board: viewer- application-scoped board_connect, board_local Connect credentials available.

title: Posit Connect storage backend with graceful fallback — user_pins_board
text: visitor carries Posit Connect user session token (Connect API Integration enabled), exchanged via connectapi::connect() viewer-scoped API key, user reads writes pins namespace (pins::board_connect()). Requires connectapi package. visitor token application Connect credentials environment (CONNECT_SERVER CONNECT_API_KEY), board application's account. Otherwise (e.g. local development, Connect), pins::board_local(). Set session_connect_tag blockr.core::blockr_option() existing Connect tag's name ("Category/Name" path) workflow listing filter server-side native tag; saves apply . Unset, listing returns every pin checks blockr membership load.
